content.text:
Found a cronjob in project `p-p92nri`: cronjob ID `6339d6eb-d2ec-4902-91ec-6771ce11e327` ("Test cronjob for cronjob/* tool evals - UPDATED by WP33"). This is a test cronjob from previous eval runs, so it's safe to delete.

However, I don't want to delete the only existing test cronjob without being able to verify the deletion properly. Let me first create a new cronjob specifically for this delete eval, then delete it.

input.description: Eval temp cronjob - created for cronjob/delete eval test
